user.title: Gaming Status Setup
user.description:
Enter your SteamGridDB API Key to automatically fetch beautiful game cover art. You can get a free key at [SteamGridDB]({api_url}).

**Optional:** You can leave this blank and rely on custom covers or player avatars instead or add a key later.

abort.single_instance_allowed: Only one instance of Gaming Status can be configured.

init.title: Gaming Status Configuration
init.description:
Update your SteamGridDB API key or toggle the sidebar icon below.

🎮 [**Click Here to Open the Web Configurator**](/gaming-status-config)

*Use the configurator to manage players, notification endpoints, and weekly reports.*
